system.description: *The Blood Smith practice at its absolute limit.* Pay 20 HP instead of 3 AP (costs 0 AP). Deal 28 + IRON melee damage to one adjacent target and 14 + IRON to all other enemies within 15 feet. Apply Bleed 6, Expose 6, and Vulnerable 6 to the primary target. Apply Bleed 3 and Expose 3 to all secondary targets. Restore 16 HP to yourself as the lattice reconverges at maximum output. At the start of your next turn, pay 10 HP — the morning after always comes.
